case.question: How does the SENS motion – For Healthcare package differ from the SENS motion – For Research package?
case.gold_answer: The Healthcare package includes a patient app and optional monitor display, while the Research package includes a smartphone app and web-application for managing sensors.

question_info.atomic_question: How does the SENS motion – For Healthcare package differ from the SENS motion – For Research package?
How does the SENS motion – For Healthcare package differ from the SENS motion – For Research package?

entity_context.scope_note: All information in this object is directly related to the resolved entity of the atomic question.
entity_context.label: SENS motion for Healthcare

outgoing_data_properties.value: Patients will be provided with a tablet in the room where the motivation app is installed. The app will motivate patients to better self-mobilize by giving them a guided virtual tour of Copenhagen. On the app, patients can follow their own activity overview, see how far in the tour they have come, the number of steps and how much active time they have had, both that day and in the last week
It is recommended to read the user manual before using SENS motion

The motivation app will motivate patients to better self-mobilize by giving them a guided virtual tour of Copenhagen. On the app, patients can follow their own activity overview, see how far in the tour they have come, the number of steps and how much active time they have had, both that day and in the last week

The motivation app will motivate patients to better self-mobilize by giving them a guided virtual tour of Copenhagen. On the app, patients can follow their own activity overview, see how far in the tour they have come, the number of steps and how much active time they have had, both that day and in the last week

Staff will have access to an overview screen, where they can easily get an overview of patients' physical activity, including when patients were last mobilized. This will allow staff to prioritise which patients are most important to help with mobilization
